prompt:
This PR has merge conflicts with main after earlier PRs were merged. Rebase onto main and resolve all conflicts.

The PR brings Radarr to full parity with Sonarr — adds read endpoints (quality profiles, root folders, download clients, blocklist, manual search, get movie detail) and write operations (update monitoring, delete movie, trigger search, grab release, remove blocklist). The conflicts are likely in:
- internal/agent/tools.go (tool definitions)
- internal/agent/agent.go (dispatchTool switch cases)
- internal/radarr/client.go (Client interface)
- internal/radarr/types.go

After rebasing:
1. Run 'go build ./...' to verify compilation
2. Run 'make test' or 'go test ./...' to verify tests pass
3. Push with 'git push --force-with-lease'
